jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at Jupiter Hospital
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Jupiter Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Radiologist to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Jupiter Hospital:
Jupiter Hospital is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICU Management
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Medical Coding

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jupiter Hospital!
